name: Braswell&Son Franklin Murfreesboro Rd
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop and luxury goods dealer operating since 1979 across Arkansas and Tennessee, specializing in authenticated jewelry, watches, handbags, and collectibles.
description_long:
Braswell & Son is a family-owned pawn and luxury goods business established in 1979, currently operating 8 locations across Little Rock, Conway, and Nashville. The company positions itself as a trusted marketplace for high-end items, combining traditional pawn services with retail sales of authenticated pre-owned luxury goods. Their business model centers on three primary revenue streams: pawning items for quick cash, purchasing valuables outright from customers, and retailing authenticated pre-owned luxury merchandise online and in-store.

The company offers traditional pawn loans with typical 30-day terms and extension options (terms vary by state and location), requiring only a valid ID with no credit checks. They also buy jewelry, watches, handbags, instruments, coins, bullion, and electronics for immediate payment. Their retail operation focuses on authenticated fine jewelry, designer handbags (Louis Vuitton, Chanel), luxury watches, instruments, and tech items. All items are backed by their Braswell Authenticity Guarantee (B.A.G.), which uses advanced verification methods for luxury goods.

The company differentiates itself through in-house expertise: a graduate gemologist and in-house jeweler certify all fine jewelry. Their authentication process specifically examines details down to stitching on handbags and sneakers. The family-owned structure and multi-decade operating history provide brand continuity. Their online retail presence at shopbraswell.com extends reach beyond physical locations, offering curated new, pre-loved, and vintage items.

Braswell & Son serves customers seeking immediate liquidity through collateral-based borrowing or direct sales, as well as buyers seeking authenticated luxury goods at discounted prices. However, like all pawn operations, borrowers should understand that failure to repay results in item forfeiture, and pawn loans carry interest and fees that vary by state. The business is fundamentally transactional rather than credit-building, making it suitable only for short-term cash needs rather than long-term financial solutions.
pros: No credit checks required for pawn loans—only valid ID needed
On-the-spot item evaluation and fast, confidential pawn process
In-house graduate gemologist and jeweler authenticate all fine jewelry
Braswell Authenticity Guarantee (B.A.G.) uses advanced verification methods examining details like stitching
Three service options: pawn for loans, sell outright for same-day payment, or shop pre-owned inventory
30-day pawn terms with extension options available
Multi-location convenience across Arkansas (Little Rock, Conway) and Tennessee (Nashville)
Online shopping available for authenticated pre-owned luxury goods
cons: Pawn loans result in item forfeiture if not redeemed—items are not returned after default
Fees and interest terms vary significantly by state and store location, creating unclear pricing transparency
Does not build credit history or help improve credit scores—purely transactional lending
Pawn loans are short-term solutions (30 days initially) unsuitable for ongoing financial needs
Limited to customers with physical luxury goods to pledge or sell—not accessible to those without collateral
best_for: People needing immediate short-term cash who own luxury items (jewelry, watches, handbags) they can temporarily part with
Sellers of estate jewelry, vintage watches, or designer goods seeking quick payment without consignment delays
Buyers seeking authenticated pre-owned luxury items at discounted prices with authenticity guarantees
Individuals without credit history or with damaged credit who cannot qualify for traditional loans
diagnosis: Braswell & Son is best for individuals with immediate short-term cash needs who own luxury goods they can pledge as collateral, or collectors seeking authenticated pre-owned luxury items. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are not credit-building products and default results in permanent loss of the pledged item—this is a high-cost, short-term liquidity solution unsuitable for ongoing financial management.
services: Pawn loans on luxury goods (jewelry, watches, handbags, instruments, electronics)
Purchase of estate, antique, modern, and broken jewelry
Online retail of authenticated pre-owned fine jewelry
Online retail of authenticated pre-owned luxury watches
Online retail of authenticated pre-owned designer handbags

places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 1203 Murfreesboro Rd #140, Franklin, TN 37064, USA
